content:
# Peak Ground Acceleration

**Summary**: A measure of the maximum ground acceleration during an earthquake.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-rachmadan|Rachmadan, 2025]] predicted peak-ground-acceleration (PGA) using machine learning models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-rachmadan|Rachmadan, 2025]] Primary metric for assessing potential damage to structures and infrastructure.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-rachmadan|Rachmadan, 2025]] Measured at 60 BMKG accelerometer stations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The CatBoost model showed the smallest scatter and low bias at both the highest and lowest PGA levels. ([[2025-rachmadan|Rachmadan, 2025, p. 70]])
